  "rationale": "An open ground on a receptacle or switch is a non-compliant, hazardous condition. NEC 406.4 requires receptacles to be grounded in accordance with Article 250, and 406.9 addresses grounding of devices. The open ground eliminates the intended safety path for fault current and must be corrected before the work can be accepted.",
